reviews.text: Andrea was truly the best wedding photographer we could have ever asked for.  Prior to the wedding she was so enjoyable to work with, so communicative, and partnered great with my wedding planner Kira Barczy. Day of the wedding, Andrea did an amazing job shepherding the craziness that comes with wedding day. Her and her team did a great job organizing everyone and ensuring all photos were captured. I was so grateful to have her on wedding day! Then came the wedding photos.... my mind was / is truly blown! I couldn't have asked for better photos to capture the day. Every photo is perfect and she seamlessly captured all the details of the day. The photo collection tells an amazing story of our day and nothing was missed. Here are such a few of the jaw dropping photos. If you are considering Andrea as your wedding photographer, look no further. She is your girl!!!

I can't say enough of how much we appreciate the opportunity to work with Andrea on our wedding day. Andrea did such an amazing job capturing the love of our wedding day and the true essence of us as a couple.  She was fun to be with, keeping picturing taking light and not too serious, just like us.  Andrea was flexible, kind, and independent.  Looking back at our photos brings tears to my eyes and so many wonderful memories, not just of us, but of all the people who were with us on our special day.  I have too many favorites to pick just three!

My husband and I could not have asked for a better wedding photographer!! We hired Andrea to capture our intimate, low-key ceremony this past January in the mountains. We were excited to work with her from the very first phone call, and immediately felt comfortable with her photography expertise, local knowledge of the mountains, and energetic personality. And when our original plans were altered because of the pandemic, Andrea helped us find a new site for a smaller wedding group with enthusiasm that helped to calm my own anxiety.

The day of the ceremony, Andrea’s energy was absolutely infectious! During the ceremony, she moved around so quietly I honestly forgot she was there - and yet the photos she captured were absolutely stunning! She also had great knowledge of the area we had picked, including which snow covered rocks were safe to step on and which angles worked best in the setting sun. We had our sneak peek photos within HOURS of the ceremony - truly incredible! And the rest were delivered to us much sooner than I expected.

My husband and I love looking through our photos, we honestly can’t get enough of them. We especially love the film photos, which have such beautiful colors and a classy feel. We cannot recommend Andrea enough - her energy is what every bride and groom need on their wedding day!!

Last minute travel from Iowa, Andrea was amazing to work with! My Fiancé and I decided to get our engagement photos taken out there since we want to get married in CO. It was only two weeks away from our trip when I reached out to Andrea and she confirmed right away that she'd love to work with us. I informed Andrea that I would need help with outfits and we wouldn't know how to pose, she put me at ease by sending me her helpful styling guide and assured me she'll help us with posing. Andrea was so sweet and easy to work with when we met up, it was a lot of fun! I appreciated how quickly her responses were, how smoothly the process went and of course blown away by these pictures! Thank you Andrea!!

Andrea is simply the best.  She is gifted and shares that gift by giving her clients beautiful photos to capture their greatest memories.  I am so grateful for her professional, detailed approach to her work.  For our newborn lifestyle shoot she came fully prepared with all the props and wraps needed.  She was so gentle and loving with our new born, three and six year old children that our family felt at ease through out the whole shoot.  She over exceeded my expectations by spending three hours with us making sure to get all the shots we wanted.  She is so creative and thoughtful that she directed us to give us the greatest outcome. We have had Andrea do our photos for two years now and I’m excited for more photos in the future! I can not fully express my gratitude.  💕👌🏻🙏🏻
